title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You're amaaazing! You got so many! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You're amaaazing! You got so many! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
See? Aren't I even cuter with a buncha plushies in
my arms? ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Sooo, to thank you for winning these for me... I'll
give you one! Which one do you want?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Sooo, to thank you for winning these for me... I'll
give you one! Which one do you want?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: By the way... it doesn't have to be one of these!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'm letting you pick the cutest one! You can pick from all the cuties in front of you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'm letting you pick the cutest one! You can pick from all the cuties in front of you! ♪
